EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ILasHeaderInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to the header information of LAS files.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("89F48C7A-AC12-4371-92C3-194559BB354B")]
public interface ILasHeaderInfo

Properties

Extent

The XYZ extent of points in the LAS file.

IEnvelope Extent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

The LAS file's source ID.

int FileSourceID { get; }

int

Sample Snippet

FlightDateJulian

The flight date based on the Julian calendar.

int FlightDateJulian { get; }

int

The software used to create the LAS file.

string GeneratingSoftware { get; }

string

HasGpsTime

Indicates GPS time is available.

bool HasGpsTime { get; }

Property Value

bool

Indicates if RGB is availabe.

bool HasRGB { get; }

bool

Sample Snippet

IsStandardGpsTime

Indicates if the GPS time is standard GPS Time.

bool IsStandardGpsTime { get; }

bool

The number of points in the LAS file.

double NumberOfPointRecords { get; }

double

The number of variable length records in the LAS file.

double NumberOfVariableLengthRecords { get; }

double

The record format for points in the LAS file

int PointDataFormat { get; }

int

The LAS file's project ID.

UID ProjectID { get; }

The spatial reference of the LAS file.

ISpatialReference

SystemID

The hardware system used to collect the LiDAR data in the LAS file.

string SystemID { get; }

Property Value

string

Year

The year the data in the LAS file was collected.

int Year { get; }

int
